name: German Potato Salad for 50
recipeIngredient: 1 quart well seasoned soup stock (chicken, beef or veal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes.
2. Cook in salted water until just tender, then drain well.
3. Cover and cool.
4. Peel and slice the potatoes.
5. Add onions to the sliced potatoes.
6. Sprinkle on salt, pepper and sugar.
7. Add oil and vinegar.
8. Mix carefully.
9. Last, add soup stock; mix thoroughly.
Note: Use only pink new potatoes, sliced very thin. Be sure the stock is added last. It must be well seasoned.
